holdings.infoBox: SIL is an equity ETF with a total of 43 individual holdings. The top holdings are Wheaton Precious Metals stock at 21.76%, Pan American Silver at 12.50%, Coeur Mining at 11.04%, First Majestic Silver at 4.80%, and Fresnillo at 4.68%.

overview.description: The Global X Silver Miners ETF (SIL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of companies actively engaged in the silver mining industry. SIL was launched on Apr 19, 2010 and is issued by Global X.
infoTable: Stuttgart Solactive AG Global Silver Miners
